---
name: Bug Ticket
about: Report a bug or broken behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Bug Summary

Describe the bug clearly and briefly.

## Current behavior

- What is happening right now?
- Where does the bug occur?
- What is visible to the user?

## Expected behavior

- What should happen instead?
- What would be the correct behavior?

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to `...`
2. Click on `...`
3. Enter `...`
4. See error

## Impact

- Does the bug block a main user flow?
- Is it only visual or also functional?
- Does it affect all users or only specific cases?

## Acceptance criteria

- The bug is no longer reproducible.
- The affected user flow works as expected.
- No new errors are introduced in related areas.
- The UI remains stable and understandable.

## Tasks

- [ ] Identify the cause of the bug
- [ ] Implement the fix
- [ ] Test the affected flow
- [ ] Test related areas for regressions
- [ ] Update UI text or feedback if needed

## Notes

- Add screenshots, console errors, or other technical details here.
- Link related issues, PRs, or affected files if relevant.
